title: analisa prd ini beri tanggapan km 1. jelaskan impact nya, su

messages.content: analisa prd ini beri tanggapan km 1. jelaskan impact nya, sudah ada impact analisis atau blm 2. jika implementasi apa saja yang harus di perhatikan dari sisi fe dan be 3. apa yg harus QA perhatikan setelah itu beri revisi ke PRD nya jika perlu

Baik, saya akan analisa PRD tersebut secara menyeluruh. Mari saya mulai dengan membaca semua file yang relevan.Sekarang mari saya cek apakah sudah ada QA Assessment atau Impact Analysis yang sudah dibuat untuk fitur ini.Sekarang cek apakah sudah ada assessment sebelumnya di kedua folder tersebut.Mari saya baca assessment yang sudah ada.Sekarang mari saya baca juga file assessment yang lain untuk melihat apakah ada versi lain.Sekarang saya sudah membaca semua dokumen. Berikut analisa saya secara komprehensif:

---

# 📋 **Analisa PRD: WhatsApp Web Outbound Anti-Ban Guard**

## 1. **Impact Analysis — Sudah Ada atau Belum?**

### ✅ **SUDAH ADA — dan sangat komprehensif**

Terdapat **3 dokumen impact analysis** yang sudah dibuat:

| Dokumen | Path | Isi |
|---------|------|-----|
| **QA Assessment v1.0** (dari folder `wa-outbound-anti-ban-guard/`) | `Assessments/whatsapp-web/wa-outbound-anti-ban-guard/wa-outbound-anti-ban-guard-qa-assessment.md` | Decision: `REVISE_PRD` (NO_GO). Blast radius analysis di **Section 5 — Impact Analysis** mencakup Module, DB, API, UI/UX, Security, Performance, Integration, Reporting. |
| **QA Assessment v1.0** (dari folder `outbound-anti-ban-guard-qa-assessment/`) | `Assessments/whatsapp-web/outbound-anti-ban-guard-qa-assessment/outbound-anti-ban-guard-qa-assessment-qa-assessment.md` | Decision: `PROCEED_WITH_CAUTION`. Impact analysis lebih detail di **Section 3 — Impact Analysis** mencakup direct/indirect impact ke existing WA Web, broadcast, conversation room, dan dependency ke Anti Spam System. |
| **Repo Impact & Estimation** | `Assessments/whatsapp-web/wa-outbound-anti-ban-guard/wa-outbound-anti-ban-repo-impact-and-estimation.md` | Impact per repo (BE + FE) lengkap dengan services, schemas, Redis keys, RabbitMQ patterns, Proto changes, dan estimasi SP per sprint. |
| **Final Gap Review** | `Assessments/whatsapp-web/wa-outbound-anti-ban-guard/wa-outbound-anti-ban-final-gap-review.md` | 7 gap identifikasi + rekomendasi final actions. |

### ⚠️ **Catatan Penting: Ada Dua Assessment dengan Decision Berbeda**

| Assessment | Decision | Implikasi |
|-----------|----------|-----------|
| **Folder `wa-outbound-anti-ban-guard/`** | `REVISE_PRD` (NO_GO) — Harus lock 7 OQ dulu | **Yield** ke folder yang ini karena decision lebih safety-conscious dan gap review lebih lengkap |
| **Folder `outbound-anti-ban-guard-qa-assessment/`** | `PROCEED_WITH_CAUTION` (CONDITIONAL_GO) — Bisa jalan dengan syarat | **Versi ini** sebenarnya lebih baru (2026-07-16 vs 2026-06-10) tapi decision-nya lebih agresif |

> **Saya merekomendasikan mengikuti decision dari folder `wa-outbound-anti-ban-guard/`** yang `REVISE_PRD` karena:
> 1. 7 open questions masih blocking dan belum dijawab
> 2. Anti Spam System (dependency utama) **BELUM developed**
> 3. Risk scoring formula masih black box

---

## 2. **Jika Implementasi — Apa yang Harus Diperhatikan dari Sisi FE dan BE**

### 🖥️ **Sisi FE (Frontend)**

| Prioritas | Area | Detail |
|-----------|------|--------|
| **🔴 P0** | **Send Button State Machine** | Button harus punya 4 state: `idle → loading → success/warning/blocked`. Disable submit while pending (FR-012). Jangan sampai double-click bypass — **server-side idempotency tetap jadi lapisan terakhir**. |
| **🔴 P0** | **Error Handling UI — 10 EH scenarios** | Setiap error handling (EH-001 sampai EH-010) butuh UI component: toast untuk warning, inline banner untuk delay, blocking modal untuk hard-block. Semua teks **Bahasa Indonesia**. Contoh: "Aktivitas pengiriman terlalu cepat. Coba beberapa saat lagi." |
| **🔴 P0** | **Permission-based Menu Gating** | Operator → hanya lihat warning sendiri. Supervisor → read-only audit logs. Admin → full settings + logs. Super Admin → cross-tenant scope. Support → read-only + limited override (masih TBD). **Server-side enforcement mandatory — UI hiding saja tidak cukup.** |
| **🟡 P1** | **Anti-Ban Settings Page (Baru)** | Form dengan validasi: antiBanMode (dropdown), dedupeWindowSeconds, cooldown, thresholds, pasteRiskEnabled toggle, senderSafeModeEnabled toggle. Validasi client-side + server-side. |
| **🟡 P1** | **Audit Log Table Page (Baru)** | Read-only table: actor, sender, recipientFingerprint (masked), action, reasonCode, timestamp. Filter: time range, account, actor, result. Role-gated. |
| **🟡 P1** | **Cooldown Countdown Timer** | Saat operator kena cooldown, tunjukkan countdown "Tunggu X detik" — jangan hanya "Coba beberapa saat lagi" tanpa indikasi waktu. |
| **🟡 P1** | **Account Detail Safe Mode Badge** | Di halaman WhatsApp Web Settings, tunjukkan status `NORMAL / SAFE_MODE / RESTRICTED` per account dengan badge warna. |
| **🟢 P2** | **Socket Events Handling** | `wa.sender.safe_mode.changed` → update store + UI badge. `wa.outbound.validation.result` → update send button state real-time. |
| **🟢 P2** | **Broadcast Pre-check Warning** | Sebelum campaign start, validasi risiko + tampilkan warning jika ada potensi masalah. |

### ⚙️ **Sisi BE (Backend)**

| Prioritas | Area | Detail |
|-----------|------|--------|
| **🔴 P0** | **Idempotency Key Generation** | Key = SHA-256(tenantId + channelType + senderAccountId + recipientId + contentFingerprint + outboundSource + logicalScopeReference). **Normalization rules harus fix**: trim whitespace, collapse spaces, lowercase, hapus zero-width chars, preserve emoji. |
| **🔴 P0** | **Redis Infrastructure — 5 Key Namespaces** | 1) `anti-ban:idem:{tenantId}:{hash}` (TTL = dedupeWindow) 2) `anti-ban:lock:{tenantId}:{recipientId}` (TTL 30s) 3) `anti-ban:cooldown:{tenantId}:{actorId}` (TTL = cooldownSeconds) 4) `anti-ban:risk:{tenantId}:{actorId}` (sliding 60s window) 5) `anti-ban:sender:{tenantId}:{accountId}` (TTL = safeModeSeconds). **Semua Redis keys harus survive service restart.** |
| **🔴 P0** | **Risk Scoring Engine** | Weighted sum dari 4 signals: pasteSignal (0.3), composeToSendDuration (0.4), contentSimilarity (0.2), burstFrequency (0.1). Rolling 60s sliding window. Score 0-100. Decay 50%/menit. Threshold mapping harus fix sebelum dev mulai. |
| **🔴 P0** | **Recipient Lock (Distributed)** | Lock sebelum dispatch. TTL 30s, heartbeat tiap 10s, timeout 5s. Force-release setelah TTL expired — lalu trigger re-evaluation, **bukan auto-dispatch**. Background deadlock detection worker tiap 60s. |
| **🔴 P0** | **Reconciliation State Machine** | Post-dispatch timeout → `RECONCILIATION_PENDING` → scheduled check → `CONFIRMED_SENT` / `CONFIRMED_FAILED` / `UNRESOLVED_TIMEOUT`. **NO blind resend.** Tambah intermediate states: `DISPATCHING`, `QUEUED`, `RETRYING`. |
| **🔴 P0** | **Safe Mode — Integration dengan Account Health** | Identifikasi **exact producer** dari restriction signal. Siapa yang emit `wa.sender.safe_mode.changed`? WhatsApp service, external webhook, atau anti-ban sendiri? **Ini masih OQ dan blocking.** |
| **🟡 P1** | **3 API Endpoints Baru** | `POST /api/wa/outbound/validate` (core), `GET /api/wa/outbound/anti-ban/logs` (audit), `PATCH /api/wa/outbound/anti-ban/settings` (config). Proto baru + codegen. |
| **🟡 P1** | **RabbitMQ Event Patterns Baru** | 5 patterns: `wa.outbound.validation.result`, `wa.sender.safe_mode.changed`, `wa.outbound.reconciliation.updated`, `wa.outbound.duplicate.suppressed`, `wa.outbound.risk.blocked`. Daftarkan di `EventTypeEnum`. |
| **🟡 P1** | **3 MongoDB Collections Baru** | `WaOutboundAttempt`, `WaAntiBanAuditLog`, `WaAntiBanConfig`. Indexing perlu direncanakan — query audit log berdasarkan tenant + timerange. |
| **🟡 P1** | **Fail-Open / Fail-Close Strategy** | Jika Anti-Ban Service down > 5 detik → **fail-open** (outbound jalan tanpa proteksi). Log degraded mode. Alert admin. Resume saat service pulih. **Keputusan ini harus fix sebelum implementasi.** |
| **🟢 P2** | **Performance — Pre-send ≤ 100ms p95** | Cache risk score per operator dalam window yang sama. Untuk broadcast 10,000 recipient, validation overhead ~16 menit — perlu async validation atau batch processing. **Budget performa ini perlu disepakati dengan Engineering.** |
| **🟢 P2** | **Proto + gRPC New RPCs** | `ValidateOutboundAttempt`, `GetAntiBanConfig`, `UpdateAntiBanConfig`. Enum baru: `OutboundAttemptState`, `AntiBanReasonCode`. |

---

## 3. **Yang Harus QA Perhatikan**

### 🎯 **Test Strategy Priority**

| Priority | Fokus | Detail |
|----------|-------|--------|
| **🔴 P0 — Smoke** | **Idempotency** — double-click, 2 tabs, duplicate broadcast recipient → pastikan 1 send only | **Risk Blocking** — trigger paste threshold, burst threshold → pastikan action sesuai mode | **Safe Mode** — account restriction trigger → pastikan new sends STOP | **Reconciliation** — timeout → `RECONCILIATION_PENDING` → no blind resend |
| **🔴 P0 — Smoke** | **Send Button State** — UI disabled saat pending, enabled saat success/error, blocked saat kena policy | **Error Handling UI** — semua 10 EH scenarios muncul dengan benar dan Bahasa Indonesia yang tepat |
| **🟡 P1 — Regression** | **Existing send flow masih jalan normal** — broadcast, manual room, attachment, template — tidak broken | **Account management tidak affected** — add/edit/remove account masih normal | **Conversation room UX tidak terganggu** — typing indicator, read receipt, dll |
| **🟡 P1 — Regression** | **RBAC regression** — pastikan permission existing tidak berubah: operator, supervisor, admin, super admin, support |
| **🟢 P2 — Edge Cases** | **Concurrency** — 100 worker → same recipient → lock contention, one winner | **Lock timeout recovery** — worker crash → TTL expire → re-evaluation, no auto-dispatch | **Service failure** → fail-open fallback setelah 5 detik, resume saat pulih |
| **🟢 P2 — Edge Cases** | **Fingerprint normalization** — whitespace, unicode, zero-width chars, emoji — pastikan deterministic | **Large broadcast performance** — 10,000 recipient → validasi overhead timing |
| **⚫ P3 — Negative** | **Invalid config** → safe default fallback + admin alert | **Invalid idempotency key** → proper error | **Permission violation** → 403 proper error | **Service down** → graceful degradation |

### ⚠️ **Concurrency Test — Wajib Di-Simulasikan**

| Skenario | Cara Test | Expected |
|----------|-----------|----------|
| **Double-click send** | Inject 2 rapid API calls dengan idempotency key sama | 1 send only, kedua suppressed dengan reason code `DUPLICATE_SUPPRESSED` |
| **2 browser tabs same message** | Buka 2 tab, submit near-simultaneously | 1 winner, 1 suppressed. Winner lihat success, loser lihat "Pesan serupa sudah sedang diproses." |
| **2 broadcast workers overlap** | Simulasikan 2 worker dengan recipient list overlap | Recipient-level lock → one winner per recipient. Log collision outcome. |
| **Timeout + retry** | Inject post-dispatch timeout | Attempt → `RECONCILIATION_PENDING` → scheduled reconciliation → no blind resend |
| **Operator burst 5 messages in 60s** | Script rapid send 5 messages | Threshold → cooldown → warning/block sesuai mode |
| **Account restriction mid-broadcast** | Trigger restriction saat broadcast sedang jalan | Remaining recipients blocked. Log partial-stop decision. |

### 📊 **Regression Test — Area Kritis**

| Area | Risiko Jika Tidak Di-Test | Level |
|------|--------------------------|-------|
| **WA Web existing send flow** | Semua outbound broken jika integrasi anti-ban salah | **CRITICAL** |
| **Broadcast worker normal flow** | Worker bisa gagal total jika lock mechanism error | **CRITICAL** |
| **Conversation room send flow** | Agent tidak bisa kirim pesan sama sekali | **HIGH** |
| **Account management** | Account tidak bisa login/logout/QR scan kena side effect | **HIGH** |
| **Admin settings existing pages** | Halaman settings lain broken karena ada page baru | **MEDIUM** |
| **Anti Spam System (jika sudah ada)** | Konflik logika antara anti-ban dan anti-spam | **HIGH** |

### 🤖 **Automation Candidates**

| Test Case | Level | Priority | Automation Status |
|-----------|-------|----------|------------------|
| Duplicate send suppression — double click | Integration | P0 | **Automated Ready** |
| Duplicate send suppression — two tabs | E2E | P0 | Manual Only (butuh 2 browser context) |
| Idempotency key generation — valid input | Unit | P0 | **Automated Ready** |
| Idempotency key generation — normalization | Unit | P2 | **Automated Ready** |
| Risk scoring — paste threshold | Integration | P1 | **Automated Ready** |
| Risk scoring — burst threshold | Integration | P1 | **Automated Ready** |
| Cooldown timing — exact duration | Integration | P1 | **Automated Ready** |
| Safe mode — trigger from restriction event | Integration | P0 | **Automated Ready** |
| Safe mode — auto-exit after duration | Integration | P1 | **Automated Ready** |
| Reconciliation — timeout → pending → resolved | E2E | P1 | Manual Only (butuh state injection) |
| Lock contention — 2 workers same recipient | Integration | P2 | Manual Only (butuh worker simulation) |
| Lock timeout recovery — worker crash | Integration | P2 | Manual Only (butuh crash simulation) |
| Service failure → fail-open fallback | Integration | P1 | Manual Only (butuh service shutdown) |
| Fingerprint normalization — whitespace, unicode | Unit | P2 | **Automated Ready** |
| Invalid config → safe default | Integration | P2 | **Automated Ready** |
| Permission violation — operator access settings | E2E | P0 | **Automated Ready** |

---

## 4. **Revisi ke PRD (Wajib Dilakukan)**

Berdasarkan 7 GAP yang ditemukan di Final Gap Review, berikut revisi yang **WAJIB** dilakukan ke PRD sebelum engineering mulai:

### 📝 **Revisi #1: Risk Scoring Formula — HARUS DIISI**

**PRD saat ini:** FR-014, FR-015 cuma bilang "detect" dan "calculate" — **black box**.

**Revisi:**
```
FR-014a [P0]: Risk scoring formula MUST use weighted sum of signals:
  pasteSignal (weight 0.3) — binary
  composeToSendDurationMs (weight 0.4) — linear, faster = higher risk
  contentSimilarityScore (weight 0.2) — cosine similarity to last N messages
  burstFrequency (weight 0.1) — count of sends in rolling 60s window

FR-014b [P0]: Score range 0-100. Sliding 60s window. Decay 50%/minute normal activity.

FR-014c [P0]: Threshold mapping:
  monitor_only → log only, no action
  warning_only → warn at score > 40
  soft_block → delay at > 50, queue at > 70
  strict → block at > 40
```

### 📝 **Revisi #2: Fingerprint Normalization Rules — HARUS FIX**

**PRD saat ini:** FR-001 bilang "normalized content fingerprint" tapi **tidak detail**.

**Revisi:**
```
FR-001a [P0]: Content normalization MUST:
  - Trim leading/trailing whitespace
  - Collapse multiple spaces → single space
  - Convert to lowercase
  - Remove zero-width characters (U+200B, U+200C, U+200D, U+FEFF)
  - Preserve emoji and non-latin characters as-is

FR-001b [P0]: Idempotency key components (ordered):
  1. tenantId
  2. channelType (fixed: "whatsapp")
  3. senderAccountId
  4. recipientId (normalized phone number)
  5. contentFingerprint (sha256 of normalized content)
  6. outboundSource (enum: broadcast | conversation_manual)
  7. logicalScopeReference (broadcastId or conversationId)
```

### 📝 **Revisi #3: Lock Timeout & TTL Default Values**

**PRD saat ini:** FR-007 bilang "TTL or recovery-safe expiration" — **tanpa angka**.

**Revisi:**
```
FR-005a [P0]: Lock acquisition timeout: 5 seconds
FR-005b [P0]: Lock TTL default: 30 seconds
FR-005c [P0]: Lock recovery: force-release after TTL, trigger re-evaluation (NOT auto-dispatch)
FR-005d [P1]: Deadlock detection: background worker tiap 60s
```

### 📝 **Revisi #4: Reconciliation Flow — Tambah Intermediate States**

**PRD saat ini:** Missing states `DISPATCHING`, `QUEUED`, `RETRYING`.

**Revisi:**
Tambah ke State Transition Model:
```
DISPATCHING  — setelah LOCKED, sebelum SENT
QUEUED       — ketika throttle/cooldown aktif
RETRYING     — retry setelah reconciliation pending
```

### 📝 **Revisi #5: Fail-Open/Fail-Close Behavior**

**PRD saat ini:** NFR bilang "degrade safely" — **tidak detail**.

**Revisi:**
```
FR-033 [P0]: Anti-Ban Service failure behavior:
  - Down > 5 detik → fail-open (outbound jalan tanpa proteksi)
  - Log degraded mode di audit trail
  - Alert admin: "Perlindungan anti-ban tidak aktif"
  - Resume normal validation saat service pulih (max 10 detik window)
  - Fail-open mode tetap enforce idempotency key via local cache
```

### 📝 **Revisi #6: Default Values — Review Ulang**

| Field | PRD Default | Rekomendasi | Alasan |
|-------|------------|-------------|--------|
| dedupeWindowSeconds | 120 | **300** | Broadcast bisa > 2 menit |
| pasteFastSendThresholdMs | 1200 | **2000** | Operator cepat legitimate |
| senderSafeModeDurationSeconds | 300 | **1800** | 5 menit terlalu pendek untuk recovery |

### 📝 **Revisi #7: Dependency Order dengan Anti Spam System**

**PRD saat ini:** Asumsi "reused" — **tapi faktanya Anti Spam System BELUM developed**.

**Revisi:**
```
Tambah ke Dependencies section:
- Dependency: Anti Spam System (Account Pools, Broadcast Humanization, Warming) — BELUM developed
- Risk: Jika Anti-Ban Guard dibangun dulu, interface contract harus di-segregate sehingga Anti Spam System bisa plug-in later
- Mitigation: Define Anti-Ban → Anti Spam interface contract di PRD ini sebelum implementasi
```

### 📝 **Revisi #8: Phase 1 Scope Lock — Text Only atau Include Attachment?**

**PRD saat ini:** Tidak jelas apakah Phase 1 mencakup media, attachment, template.

**Revisi:**
```
Tambah explicit statement:
Phase 1 scope: TEXT-ONLY outbound (plain text + template text).
Attachments, media, interactive messages: Phase 2.
```

---

## **Kesimpulan Akhir**

| Aspek | Status |
|-------|--------|
| **PRD Maturity** | ✅ Sangat matang — state machine, error handling, edge cases lengkap |
| **Impact Analysis** | ✅ SUDAH ADA — 3 dokumen lengkap dengan blast radius per repo |
| **Test Strategy** | ✅ Sudah ada — 24 test cases, traceability matrix, automation mapping |
| **Gap Besar #1** | ❌ Risk scoring formula masih black box — **BLOCKING** |
| **Gap Besar #2** | ❌ Dependency ke Anti Spam System belum clear — **BLOCKING** |
| **Gap Besar #3** | ❌ Fingerprint normalization rules tidak detail — **BLOCKING** |
| **Gap Besar #4** | ❌ Fail-open/fail-close belum diputuskan — **BLOCKING** |
| **Gap Besar #5** | ❌ 7 open questions belum dijawab — **BLOCKING** |
| **Final Decision** | **`REVISE_PRD` (NO_GO)** — PRD harus direvisi dengan 8 poin di atas sebelum implementasi dimulai |

### **Rekomendasi Langkah Selanjutnya:**

1. **Minggu ini:** PRD revision workshop dengan PM (Dany Christian) + Engineering Lead (Naftal Yunior) → lock 7 OQ + 8 revisi di atas
2. **Output:** PRD v0.2 dengan semua keputusan terkunci
3. **Setelah PRD locked:** Impact analysis & estimation sudah siap — langsung bisa kickoff Sprint 1
4. **Parallel:** QA mulai persiapkan test data, test environment, dan review 24 test cases
5. **First deployment:** `monitor_only` mode → validasi log tanpa blocking → baru naik ke `warning_only` → `soft_block` → `strict`
